meanings.definition: an abnormal protuberance or localized enlargement
something that bulges out or is protuberant or projects from its surroundings
examples: the gun in his pocket made an obvious bulge
he stood on the rocky prominence
the occipital protuberance was well developed
the bony excrescence between its horns

meanings.definition: the increase in volume of certain substances when they are heated (often accompanied by release of water)
increase in size, magnitude, number, or intensity
examples: The music swelled to a crescendo

meanings.definition: become filled with pride, arrogance, or anger
examples: The mother was swelling with importance when she spoke of her son
The bellies of the starving children are swelling

meanings.definition: come up (as of feelings and thoughts, or other ephemeral things)
come up, as of a liquid
